title: Telšiai, Telšiai County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Telšiai, Telšiai County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Telšiai is a city in Telšiai County with a population of 23,000. The capital of the Samogitia region, a historic city on Lake Mastis, known for its cathedral, the Samogitian Museum, and a rich cultural heritage.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
